ns0:entry.ns0:title: aaddrick/claude-desktop-debian
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aaddrick/claude-desktop-debian
Language: shell
Claude Desktop for Debian-based Linux distributions

ns0:entry.ns0:title: anthropics/claude-code
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code
Language: shell
Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: armbian/build
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/armbian/build
Language: shell
The official build framework for the Armbian Linux distribution. This repository contains the complete toolchain and scripts required to compile custom OS images from source, including kernel configuration, U-Boot handling, and board-specific tweaks for various ARM and ARM64 single-board computers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kholia/OSX-KVM
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kholia/OSX-KVM
Language: shell
Run macOS on QEMU/KVM. With OpenCore + Monterey + Ventura + Sonoma support now! Only commercial (paid) support is available now to avoid spammy issues. No Mac system is required.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kohii/smoothcsv3
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kohii/smoothcsv3
Language: shell
SmoothCSV is a powerful and intuitive tool for editing CSV files.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: masonr/yet-another-bench-script
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/masonr/yet-another-bench-script
Language: shell
YABS - a simple bash script to estimate Linux server performance using fio, iperf3, & Geekbench

ns0:entry.ns0:title: obra/superpowers
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/obra/superpowers
Language: shell
An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: quickemu-project/quickemu
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/quickemu-project/quickemu
Language: shell
Quickly create and run optimised Windows, macOS and Linux virtual machines

ns0:entry.ns0:title: sickcodes/Docker-OSX
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sickcodes/Docker-OSX
Language: shell
Run macOS VM in a Docker! Run near native OSX-KVM in Docker! X11 Forwarding! CI/CD for OS X Security Research! Docker mac Containers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi
Language: shell
📝 A curated list of awesome Raspberry Pi tools, projects, images and resources
